author: y4rr
content: Second antipattern audit complete. Found 12 new GPU→CPU roundtrip issues (#473-#484). Key findings: (1) ALL loss backward passes force CPU (42 .cpu() calls in loss.rs), (2) norm forward/backward forces CPU (29 .cpu() calls in norm.rs), (3) SiLU/ELU/Mish/LogSoftmax forward+backward have no GPU kernels, (4) cumulative/indexing/einops ops are CPU-only. False positives eliminated: arithmetic/transcendental backward ops delegate to GPU-dispatched tensor ops, reduce_grad_to_shape has GPU fast path.
